## MeshHop 0.3.3

MeshHop 0.3.3 packages the latest desktop UI polish and makes the stable Windows release channel reproducible from GitHub Actions.

### Highlights

- Refined the desktop route, activity, and progress surfaces for a calmer, more predictable run.
- Builds both the recommended NSIS installer and the MSI package on every CI run.
- Publishes versioned installers, stable `latest` download aliases, SHA-256 checksums, and a machine-readable release manifest.
- Keeps the MeshHop website pointed at the current stable installer instead of a checked-in or locally mirrored binary.

### Downloads

- `MeshHop-windows-x64-setup.exe` — recommended installer for Windows 10/11.
- `MeshHop-windows-x64.msi` — MSI package for managed or silent deployment.
- `SHA256SUMS.txt` — checksums for the versioned and stable installer assets.
- `meshhop-release.json` — release metadata used by tooling and the website integration.

The installers are unsigned development builds. Windows SmartScreen may show an unknown-publisher warning; verify the checksum before installing.
